channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Crackhead leaving downstairs., 25th March
item.description:
Am writing to report ongoing anti-social behaviour at 139 Geffrye Street. There is frequent loud noise, strong unpleasant smells, and unsanitary behaviour in the communal areas, including urination. This is making the building very uncomfortable to live in

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Geffrye Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light not working, 25th March
item.description:
Light not working

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gundulph Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole and damaged carriage way, 25th March
item.description:
Pot hole and road damage
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 138, Blendon Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed vehicle on road, 25th March
item.description:
SORN vehicle on road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Rosecroft Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, 25th March
item.description:
Illegal parking blocking the drive way. PY11 LYV

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lower Maidstone Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large item white goods, 25th March
item.description:
Large item of white goods possibly shop type refrigerator. On foot path between watery lane and A20
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Watery Lane, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass cutting today, 25th March
item.description:
The verges are being cut today, three weeks since the last time and again verges are muddy/damaged. Cut too short or too soon?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Wickham Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of large branches and a piece of car debris in stream, 25th March
item.description:
I walk this way frequently and I haven’t seen this before. Many large branches and a piece of car debris in the stream. Likely to block the flow of water over time. Looks like someone has put these here, doesn’t look like they have fallen there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnfield Wood Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opp 7 Princes Rd tree stump, 25th March
item.description:
The tree was felled last year. Can we expect a new tree to be planted? If so can we have a timeline? Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Princes Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 25th March
item.description:
The flytip has been there for the past 2 months.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sorrel Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 25th March
item.description:
These potholes have been here fur months !! I counted 17 recently !! Road needs major repairs. Half hearted attempt to fill a couple of the larger ones recently and now they’re all broken up again !! This road is a busy cut through and needs immediate attention . I am sure you’ve probably had many complaints already
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 167, Rectory Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 25th March
item.description:
Rubbish has not been collected for over 3 weeks, garbage bin is overflowing and attracting pests.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded mattress and mounting rubbish on Stoke Newington Road, 25th March
item.description:
A mattress has been discarded on the public footpath, which is causing a hazard, plus there is a mounting stack of rubbish at the bin on the opposite side of the street which is encouraging people to dump things too.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Zebra Crossing worn out, 25th March
item.description:
The Zebra Crossing on Erith Rd is worn out. The white stripes are barely noticeable which makes it dangerous for pedestrians crossing and also a liability risk for drivers who may not notice that it is a crossing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 417-447, Erith Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 25th March
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walm Lane, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Fly tipping of furnature and household waste, 25th March
item.description:
Many bags, chair, other general house goods dumped by bins behind beckers

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rectory Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mayplace Road East / Barnehurst Road stop nm, 25th March
item.description:
Mayplace Road East / Barnehurst Road stop nm seats are gone elderly live in the area and relied on the seats when waiting for the bus
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 138, Mayplace Road East, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 25th March
item.description:
In park side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119, Chatham Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree fallen over, 25th March
item.description:
Dead tree blown over by wind. Needs removing and ideally replace the entire tree

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Melbourne Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime Bike Menace - abandoned deliberately blocking the Footpath, 25th March
item.description:
Lime Bike Menace - abandoned deliberately blocking the Footpath. This LIME bike has been abandoned, deliberately blocking a Footpath. Please remove immediately... Lime bikes are an unacceptible menace on our Footpaths - this is not only selfish but also dangerous. Users should face the consequences of their selfish actions. I invite you, please, to urgently issue your offending “Lime bike user” an immediate ban.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greenwich Church Street, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
